summary: Tested the new Temples page (temples.html) and TEMPLES nav link across all 10 pages. Core functionality works well — page loads, all 7 temple sections present, quick-nav anchors work, TEMPLES is active in navbar. 4 broken images found.

ui_bugs.issue: 4 of 7 temple images are broken (404): temple-arunachala.jpg, subramaniam-meenakshi.jpg, gopuram.jpg, temple-kanchipuram.jpg

action_items: Add missing image files to /app/frontend/public/shaivam/images/: temple-arunachala.jpg, subramaniam-meenakshi.jpg, gopuram.jpg, temple-kanchipuram.jpg
critical_code_review_comments: 4 temple section images referenced in temples.html are missing from the images directory — images not loading for temples: Arunachaleshwaram, Sudareshwaram, Kapaleeshwaram, and Viswesa sections
context_for_next_testing_agent: Temples page passes all structural tests (7 sections, 7 quick-nav cards, 7 anchor links, TEMPLES active in navbar, footer has temples/privacy links). TEMPLES nav link present and functional across all tested pages (index, about, contact, privacy, post1). Only issue: 4 broken images need to be added to the images directory.
passed_tests: temples.html loads with title 'Sacred Temples | Shaivam Philosophy'
Navbar shows HOME | ABOUT | TEMPLES | VIDEOS | BLOG | CONNECT (TEMPLES active)
7 temple sections found with IDs: visweswaram, jambukeshwaram, brihadeshwaram, arunachaleshwaram, sudareshwaram, kapaleeshwaram, viswesa
7 anchor links (#visweswaram through #viswesa) present and clickable
Footer contains temples and privacy links
Newsletter form (email input + submit button) present
index.html TEMPLES nav link found, clicking navigates to temples.html
failed_tests: 4 images broken: temple-arunachala.jpg, subramaniam-meenakshi.jpg, gopuram.jpg, temple-kanchipuram.jpg
